title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 128.090 - Governor to notify electors
text:
128.090.  Governor to notify electors. — It shall be the duty of the governor, at the expense of the state, in all cases to immediately notify the persons chosen of their election, as soon as the same shall have been ascertained, agreeably to the provisions aforesaid.
(RSMo 1939 § 12319) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10738; 1919 § 5293; 1909 § 2752
